untranslatable_reason: Diamond top pattern formation and visual breakout detection cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators. The signal requires pattern recognition (diamond shape detection) and directional breakout confirmation which are not available in the indicator set. Volume confirmation is translatable, but the core pattern identification is not.
translation_notes: Translated breakout volume requirement as volume > 20-period historical volatility average. Exit condition uses price reversal above prior high as a proxy for stop placement near 'Pullback' level. Support zone penetration targets (15.50, 14.50) cannot be dynamically expressed without pattern-specific price levels. The 69% success rate and 17% average decline are documented but not used in entry/exit logic as requested. Recommend manual pattern validation or custom pattern detector for production use.
